old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-v0tq","title":"Reject foreign unicast DIO and DIS","description":"After authenticated decompression and before mutation, accept DIO/DIS only for exact local RPL unicast or ff02::1a; preserve DAO DODAG destination handling.","acceptance_criteria":"Broadcast-wrapped foreign-unicast DIO/DIS cause no mutation and no response; local unicast and ff02::1a continue to work; DAO forwarding remains intact.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.746793095Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.746793095Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-v0tq","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-d7uj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.83256098Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
